title: lagotis spermacocea
intro: Lagotis spermacocea, also known as Indian pennywort or Tibetan pennywort, is a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-stress effects. The health benefits of Lagotis spermacocea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and boosting the immune system. It is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or powder, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Tibetan medicine preparations.
